description: Datasette is an open source tool for exploring, analyzing, and publishing structured data, especially SQLite databases, as interactive websites and JSON APIs. It can be run locally or deployed by users to host their own data instances.
summary: Datasette exposes a self-hosted HTTP JSON API for SQLite-backed data instances plus a public `datasette` CLI for serving, publishing, inspecting, and token creation; no GraphQL or MCP surface was found.
